text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 16 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Before turmoil comes
Serenity reflected in
Your soul to see you
Through adversity

War is hell
But it must be
Dwell not
Negative signs
Focus your mind
To be your guide
Eternally
